title: cIDCraft Modpack
description: An optional modpack to be used on the cIDCraft Server. Is only client side mods made to enhance the vanilla experience.
body:
For use on the cIDCraft server. All of these mods are client side and not required to play on the vanilla server. This is just for people who want to enable extra performance and quality of life elements the vanilla experience cannot provide. As long as any added or removed mods are client side you will still be able to connect to the server.

Server is running on an AMD Ryzen 5 9600x with 32gb ram and a GTX 970. Should be plenty for a mostly vanilla server with a heck of a lot of plugins and datapacks.
